plant.title: Maidenhair Fern
plant.summary: Maidenhair Ferns are delicate, airy plants with thin black stems and soft green leaflets. They are non-toxic to pets and add a light, feathery texture to indoor spaces.
plant.contentHtml: Adiantum raddianum originates from tropical regions and thrives in high humidity and consistently moist soil. It dislikes dry air and prefers indirect light. While it can be a bit finicky about moisture, its graceful appearance is worth the care. It’s an excellent choice for bathrooms or well-humidified rooms.
